title: Gilia clivorum

intro: Gilia clivorum, also known as Purple Gilia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family, native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Gilia clivorum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
